author: Tanja V.
pros: I think KETO software is easy to use. Automatic saving is good feature. Document is always updated and report can be printed out for colleagues who are not using KETO.
cons: Summary, but I think our company it not using dashboard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: High Flexibitliy, but requires deep know-how of the tool
description: High flexibility, great support, many possibilities
author: Sladjan P.
pros: The tool is very flexible and can cover many of our requirements as we would like to have them. Idea Managemenent, Workflows, Ressource Planning, Project Planning, Risk Management, Dashboards, etc. are included and can be adapted to the needs of the company.
cons: Once the usage of the tool and the amount of data increased we had some performance issues, those have been mostly solved in the meantime. Quite often we are also running into Bugs, but the support of Keto is great and those are usually fixed quite fast. Last but not least also the overall costs for licenses and changes (adaptions on the systems) shouldnt be underestimated, since individual adaptions require quite some know-how about the application and have to be performed by Keto.

description: Basic system for portfolio management which still need development compared to competitors.
author: Mira R.
pros: Ease of use and making announcements in the system is also easy.
cons: There should be more Scalable and customizable views in systems by users in portfolio level. There is not visual addiction map of projects.

author: Jukka R.
pros: I really like to have a one-stop online tool that can be used for handling multiple project management processes. The tool is already good and it has many nice and useful features, and the development shouldn't stop here, there is still some general project management processes missing from the system (at least in our organization), and the features that we have, could benefit from some fine tuning. Ultimately I'd like to see a system that would GUIDE project manager (or the project management team) throughout the execution of the project, ideally even so that a separate project management plan or quality plan is not required.
cons: (The improvement ideas mentioned in the previous page) - The user interface is bit slow to react; It takes seconds to change pages, or to fill information. - Time management in Keto and MS project should be somehow aligned (now double work is needed). - The reporting page should be greatly improved and Keto should offer possibility for automatic distribution of the reports to stake holders. Or at least printing to PDF with company graphics. Maybe include some automatic data in the reports, such as budgetary status (if used) and on-going tasks from "resource reservations" -page? - Maybe task reminders for project manager (e.g. to fill an monthly report etc.)? - Maybe there could be a "wizard" for setting up a new project? - Maybe have a dedicated page for project personnel (i.e. a separate page for project organisation)?

description: Having not worked with anything quite like Keto in the past, the all encompassing nature of the application, and many of its features, are quite welcome. There is a long way to go in fully taking advantage of the power of the application, but we will get there.
author: Robert S.
pros: The use of Keto allowed the R&D team to pull several aspects of project management (e.g. schedule, budget, risk, NPV, etc.) into a common location whereas they had all been created and tracked in disparate applications. Keto also allows for a number of useful, customizable, dashboards providing for quick review of the entire project portfolio for any given metric.
cons: It is not always easy to understand how to use the various features to their full potential. The user manual we have is woefully inadequate. On the other hand, our Keto support team is always quick to reply to inquiries and is very helpful.

description: A great lightweighted with an even better team in the background that is truly pragmatic and does anything to exceed any client expectation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Keto platform is completely customizable and yet offers all the functionality you would possibly expect from a innovation system
cons: The reporting functionality could potentially be enriched with more modern out of the box reports. Nevertheless, the team does afresh job in customizing reports to the individual customer specific reports.

author: Kirsi H.
pros: Keto looks good compared to some of the competitors, it can be easily modified to your own needs and it's easy to use without extensive training.
cons: There are different modules, for example quality, risk mngt etc. and it would be good to have something to start on and not start inventing yourself that this kind of risk portfolio we would like to be build because sometimes the simplest, one size fits all is good enough for the beginning or we don't even know what we want but we know that we need some module.

review_title: Project management for learning and teaching tasks
author: Raimo H.
pros: I was teaching and coaching students, and I was considering easy to use project software. The Keto software as one option. After teaching, I am using the Keto software my projects. I like it offers all the needed features and functionalities. The Keto project management apps was easy to learn.
cons: The Keto project app is sometimes low and responses have to wait.

description: Very user friendly and simple to use after short introduction.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Software was modified to our company purposes and co-operation with developers were smooth and customer requests well fulfilled.
cons: Reporting tools - export to excel worksheets missing and report formats.

description: Once set up it works . sometimes we wish some functionalities would be slightly faster. Specially I value the KETO team which makes it happen and without any delays. Co operation with support team is easy and ther is no time delays to get mistakes fixed
author: Jukka R.
pros: It is flexible and easy to use. Configuration seems to be quite easy / no time consuming.
cons: I hope with new /latest platform version KETO does not loose the flexibility !

author: Nawal N.
pros: I like Keto Platform because it helps organize different projects, assess risks and weigh in the benefits. It allows you to easily create an idea portfolio. You can assess how well these ideas can develop and assign them to specific people. Categories can be added to projects and ideas which makes filtering them very easy. Keto Platform also provides you with a project report that includes the information you need.
cons: Keto Platform is a great software available to help you move on with projects and obtain good benefits. Offering a free trial will encourage people to acquire the software and be able to justify the cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Super Einfach und leicht zu nutzen
description: Super als Ergänzung zu bestehenden Systemen, Dashboard ist gut und übersichtlich.
author: Gabriele V.
pros: Die Software kann schnell und einfach konfiguriert werden, sie lässt dich gut an individuelle Prozesse anpassen und ist einfach zu integrieren.
cons: Die Software unterstützt nicht alle Sprachen

author: Juha N.
pros: Filtering for portfolio view Opening of new project
cons: Reporting Complexity Too many variables

author: Lauri P.
pros: Status reporting works well and is easy to use.
cons: Made decisions (e.g. G3 Ending Decision) are not updated to the Gate Decisions sheet (or maybe I can not use this correctly).

author: Tuan N.
pros: Easy and quite intuitive to use. Multiple features and flexible to changes if needed
cons: There are some features (e.g. closing a risk item returns to the main menu instead of the risk itself) that can be done better for more efficiency
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ilmari K.
pros: User interface is clean and inviting.
cons: Navigation inside Keto is horrible. Resource allocations and tasks inside them are confusing.

description: I'm solving especially reporting and resource management. I would like to get familiarized myself with analytics and risk management.
author: Santeri S.
pros: Reporting is currently the most helpful. Reporting is easy to use and automatic saving decreases the risk of loosing information if the page was lost etc. The other really important thing is resource management. It it very useful to reserve resources and indicate who and when will perform a task. Keto resource management provides an essential tool for superiors to see the level of work load of each person during the year IF the feature is precisely used by every project managers..
cons: Currently I don't like that gate decisions can be approved by a project manager. Project owner should only be possible to click and approve gate decisions.

review_title: Resource management and project portfolio Fortum
description: Development and implementation have taken time but has been worth it. Simple application and possibilities to make fit for everyone. Resource an project functionalities combined logically
author: Olli V.
pros: Basic features are easy to find. Mostly intuitive. Data haven’t been missing, continuous saving works.
cons: App is slow compared to other browser based apps. Waiting times when approving tasks. Took long time to change the working procedures regarding changing the resource reservation. For some reason we are not utilizing all available data from the app. Would need online utilization rates.

description: With time we get to know the logic's of Keto plattform and start to use more of its functionalities to follow up all the activities going on in our projects and whats is more also to make the analytics.
author: Katherine Patricia M.
pros: Friendly user software. Provides a great tool to make the follow up of Gates & tasks of a project. It is pretty easy as well to make changes and add & remove items. Pretty handy to have the analytical part as well.
cons: The missing part for us at the moment is the integration with the costs. There is no possibility for us to upload the costs to the software as we don´t have no other application compatible with it. Would be great if costs could be handle directly in Keto or if could be imported from other app

review_title: Review from business with small projects/assignments
author: Margareta L.
pros: Gates, overview, place to collect main documentation
cons: Too many key words and classifications Too complex finance sheets for small projects Difficult to get easy screen overview if you have a big portfolio

author: Mohit A.
pros: UI is very smooth, fast and responsive. Keto tool is very secure and robust. It is very easy to use. It is very helpful tool for managing multiple project at a same time very flawlessly.It maintain the project workflow. We ca make reports , portfolio and track progress very easily. Really very good tool for small and large organisations.
cons: Customer support is very poor. It is paid tool. Otherwise Really a best tool for project management.

author: Maija N.
pros: Easy, good design, good features overall. It's a pleasure to use Keto compared to the complexity of other softwares.
cons: We are still not using all the potential of the software that we could.

review_title: Agile and powerful at the same time
author: Kai E.
pros: Flexibility, easy of use, no-code possibility
cons: Maybe some minor issues but easy and fluent experience in general.

description: We can now follow our projects, compare them and make portfolios from them easily. Also reporting is easily done in one place.
author: Minna P.
pros: The software is easy to use and has many useful tools like the milestone tracking. It is also possible to customize it to fit our needs.
cons: It requires a lot of work to get people to use it in a way that is then helpful for the business.

review_title: Extensive, highly customizable, but still very easy to use
author: Martin D.
pros: It has a great UI/UX and is very easy to use. Both for users as well as to setup and to customize. There are a lot of built in modules such as Resource and Task Management that I haven't seen in this quality at any other vendor
cons: The platform is constantly improving and more and more features are being added, which makes it even more powerful.
